Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the sequence of events and group them into separate cases patient journeys The events are interleaved meaning events from different cases are mixed together We need to infer which events belong to the same case based on logical continuity same patient attributes age gender sequence of activities timestamps department resource etc

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The patient attributes age gender are strong indicators Lets list distinct age gender combinations 45 M 62 F 28 M

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There are three distinct patients So we have three cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we need to assign each event to one of these three cases The events with 45 M 1 4 7 12 15 Events with 62 F 2 5 8 10 11 14 17 Events with 28 M 3 6 9 13 16 18

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check if all events with same age gender are logically consistent and form a case journey

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 45 year old male Events 1 Register patient ER 4 Initial triage ER Nurse Joy triage code 3 7 X ray imaging Radiology left leg 12 Doctor consultation ER Dr Lee diagnosis hairline fracture 15 Patient discharged ER followup outpatient clinic This sequence makes sense register triage imaging consultation discharge No surgery Fracture likely treated with cast or splint outpatient followup Timestamps 08 05 13 08 10 50 08 15 42 08 23 10 08 30 05 Good

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 62 year old female Events 2 Register patient ER 5 Initial triage ER Nurse Mark triage code 2 8 Lab test requested Dr Smith blood panel 10 Lab test completed Lab Technician normal levels 11 Doctor consultation Dr Smith diagnosis minor infection 14 Prescription created Dr Smith medication antibiotics 17 Patient discharged ER followup pharmacy pickup Sequence register triage lab request lab completed consultation prescription discharge Timestamps 08 07 02 08 12 29 08 16 10 08 20 27 08 22 54 08 27 00 08 35 29 Logical flow

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 28 year old male Events 3 Register patient Surgery 6 Doctor consultation Surgery Dr Lee reason scheduled knee surgery 9 Surgery preparation Surgical Nurse general anesthesia 13 Surgery performed Dr Lee procedure arthroscopy 16 Recovery room Recovery Nurse condition stable 18 Patient discharged Surgery followup physiotherapy sessions Sequence register at surgery likely pre op consultation prep surgery recovery discharge Timestamps 08 07 15 08 13 00 08 16 45 08 25 19 08 31 37 08 40 13 All consistent

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus the grouping is straightforward based on patient age and gender The interleaving is just mixing events from these three cases in time order So the case IDs can be assigned as Case A 45M Case B 62F Case C 28M
